zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Brooke於1447年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可時，他的父親Thomas Brooke22歲，母親Margaret Spicer15歲。他於1468年與Anne Venables在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年11月6日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Brooke于1447年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可时，他的父亲Thomas Brooke22岁，母亲Margaret Spicer15岁。他于1468年与Anne Venables在英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年11月6日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Brooke was born in 1447, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Brooke, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Spicer, was 15. He married Anne Venables in 1468, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 6 November 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Brooke est né en 1447, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Brooke, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Spicer, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anne Venables en 1468, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Brooke 1447 in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Brooke 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Spicer 15. Er hat 1468 in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England Anne Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1503 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brooke è nato il nel 1447 nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Brooke, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Spicer, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Anne Venables nel 1468, nel Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1503, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Brooke(이)가 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Brooke(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Spicer(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1468년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 Anne Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 11월 6일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brooke nasceu em 1447, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Brooke, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Spicer, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Venables em 1468, em Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1503, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Brooke родился в 1447 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Brooke было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Spicer, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Venables в 1468 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 6 ноября 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Brooke nació en 1447, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Brooke, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Spicer, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Anne Venables en 1468, en Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1503, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
